creator: nkoch@demig.de
text:
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz 
=> cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://cvschangelogb.sourceforge.net/files/.
fetch: http://cvschangelogb.sourceforge.net/files/cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 31966, actual 33102

Fix: 

(under FreeBSD 4.11 'make makesum' does not create SHA256)--4Jv5O6ogGt6Brx7Np36dcW3dCAYDQ3OPdG8tLfl7xQ7nHAmc
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- distinfo.org        Mon Jun 12 16:01:38 2006
+++ distinfo    Mon Mar  5 09:15:21 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
-MD5 (cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz) = 4bcbc94396cf8086cc572b1549167d8d
-SHA256 (cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz) = b892c59176e4250b6b9f4875a7abc20915729addf6e8bf56a9a04e5e91695de5
-SIZE (cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz) = 31966
+MD5 (cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz) = 68f1ba32f646f7522c5934692168d017
+SIZE (cvschangelogbuilder-2.3.tar.gz) = 33102
